faqs.question: What is the Evident ecosystem?
faqs.answer: A network of nine web applications built by Devon Tyler Barber, spanning legal tech, civic education, economic analysis, health advocacy, Bible study, construction tools, and home improvement services — all operating under the Evident Technologies umbrella.

faqs.question: How are the applications deployed?
faqs.answer: All applications are deployed via GitHub Pages with automated CI/CD pipelines, custom domains with SSL, and full source code available in public repositories.

faqs.question: What is the current revenue model?
faqs.answer: Revenue comes from two active streams: (1) Tillerstead — a licensed NJ Home Improvement Contractor (HIC #13VH10808800) generating revenue through TCNA-compliant professional tile installation services in South Jersey, and (2) productized web development services — custom business websites ($990–$4,990), single-page landings ($690–$1,290), and recurring website care plans ($99–$499/month).

faqs.question: What is the competitive advantage?
faqs.answer: Full-stack execution by a single founder across 9 live applications with zero technical debt, automated CI/CD, custom domains with SSL, and open-source codebases. The ecosystem creates cross-referral opportunities between legal tech, civic tools, and service businesses — a network effect most solo founders can't replicate.

faqs.question: How would investment capital be deployed?
faqs.answer: 40% infrastructure scaling (dedicated hosting, databases, API services), 30% marketing and customer acquisition (SEO, paid ads, content), 20% service expansion (hiring subcontractors for Tillerstead, expanding web dev capacity), 10% legal and compliance.

faqs.question: How can I partner with or invest in Evident?
faqs.answer: Contact iv@devon-tyler.com for investment inquiries or biz@devon-tyler.com for partnership discussions. We welcome both financial partners and strategic collaborators.
